title: Tree Pendant
shortDescription: Beautiful wire-wrapped Tree of Life pendant with natural crystal chips. Available in multiple stone varieties.
description: The Tree Pendant from Sana Crystals features an elegant wire-wrapped tree of life design set within a circular silver-toned frame. Each pendant is adorned with natural gemstone chips forming the leaves of the tree. Available in a wide range of crystal varieties including Turquoise, Tiger Eye, Garnet, Lapis Lazuli, Clear Quartz, Amethyst, Rose Quartz, Chakra mix, and many more. A versatile and meaningful jewelry piece perfect for gifting or personal use.

specifications.material: Natural Crystal Chips + Silver-tone Wire Frame

title: DP Pencil Pendant
shortDescription: Double-point crystal pencil pendant wire-wrapped in silver. Available in Clear Quartz, Black Tourmaline, Green Aventurine, Amethyst, Labradorite, Carnelian and more.
description: The DP Pencil Pendant (Double Point) from Sana Crystals features natural crystal points wire-wrapped in a silver-tone setting. These double-terminated crystals are believed to channel energy in both directions, making them especially powerful for healing and manifestation work. Available in a variety of crystal types including Clear Quartz, Black Tourmaline, Green Aventurine, Amethyst, Labradorite, Carnelian/Orange Calcite, 7 Chakra, and mixed assorted styles with decorative metal caps.

specifications.material: Natural Crystal Point + Silver-tone Wire / Metal Cap

title: SP Pencil Pendant
shortDescription: Single-point crystal pencil pendant with decorative silver metal cap. Available in 20+ stone varieties including Tiger Eye, Sodalite, Black Tourmaline, Dalmatian Jasper and more.
description: The SP Pencil Pendant (Single Point) from Sana Crystals is a polished, single-terminated crystal point pendant topped with an ornate silver-tone metal cap. These elegant pendants come in an extensive range of crystal varieties and colors. The decorative cap adds a regal, premium look to each piece. Available in Blue (Angelite/Chalcedony), Green Malachite, Labradorite, Amazonite, Green Aventurine, Rose Quartz, Red Jasper, Tiger Eye, Sodalite, Clear Quartz, Black Tourmaline, Indian Agate, Peach Moonstone, Black Obsidian, Dalmatian Jasper, Amethyst, Yellow Jasper and more.
benefits: Excellent for meditation and intention setting

specifications.material: Natural Polished Crystal + Ornate Silver-tone Metal Cap

title: Star of David Pendant
shortDescription: Natural crystal Star of David (hexagonal Merkaba) pendant with silver bail. Available in Amethyst, Tiger Eye, Moonstone, Black Obsidian, Rose Quartz and Green Aventurine.
description: The Star of David Pendant from Sana Crystals is a powerful geometric crystal pendant carved in the sacred hexagonal shape, also known as the Merkaba. Each pendant is crafted from a single piece of natural gemstone and features a silver-tone bail for easy wearing. The Star of David / Merkaba shape is considered one of the most powerful sacred geometry symbols, believed to activate the light body and provide divine protection. Available in Amethyst, Tiger Eye, Moonstone/Labradorite, Black Obsidian, Rose Quartz, and Green Aventurine.
benefits: Activates and balances the energy field
Promotes divine connection and higher consciousness

specifications.shape: Hexagonal Star / Star of David / Merkaba

title: Flat Pencil Pendant with Charm
shortDescription: Flat crystal pencil pendant with decorative silver charm. Available in multiple crystal types and charm designs — Pentagram, Tree of Life, Yoga/Meditation, Buddha, Star and more.
description: The Flat Pencil Pendant with Charm from Sana Crystals is a premium pendant featuring a flat, polished crystal slab in a pencil/tower shape, adorned with a beautifully crafted silver-tone decorative charm. Available in a variety of crystal types and charm designs. Crystal options include Amethyst, Tiger Eye, Rose Quartz, Labradorite, Orange Calcite / Peach Selenite, and more. Charm designs include Pentagram Star, Tree of Life, Yoga Meditating Figure, Buddha Face, Open Star, and other spiritual symbols. A highly popular and unique gift item.
benefits: Combines crystal healing with sacred symbolism

title: Health & Success Key Chain
shortDescription: Engraved natural gemstone key chains with 'Health' and 'Success' symbols and text. Yellow stone for Health, Black Obsidian for Success. RS 70 each.
description: The Health & Success Key Chain from Sana Crystals is a set of two unique engraved gemstone key chains. The Health key chain features a yellow/honey calcite or similar warm-toned stone engraved with the word 'Health' and a sacred healing symbol. The Success key chain features a Black Obsidian oval stone engraved with a runic success symbol and the word 'SUCCESS'. Both are attached to sturdy silver-tone key rings with a metal bail. These intention-set key chains serve as daily affirmation tools, keeping your goals and manifestations close at hand.
benefits: Keeps daily intentions and affirmations active

title: Black Tourmaline Raw Stone Pendant
shortDescription: Raw natural Black Tourmaline column pendant with gold electroplated top and bail. One of the most powerful protection crystals available.
description: The Black Tourmaline Raw Stone Pendant from Sana Crystals is a powerful and stunning piece featuring a natural, unpolished Black Tourmaline column with a luxurious gold electroplated top and bail. Black Tourmaline is widely regarded as one of the most potent protective crystals in the mineral kingdom. It creates a powerful shield against negative energies, electromagnetic radiation (EMF), psychic attacks, and environmental pollutants. The raw, natural form of the stone preserves its full energetic potency. The gold-dipped cap adds a premium aesthetic, making this pendant both beautiful and energetically powerful.
benefits: Most powerful crystal for protection against negativity
Shields from EMF and electromagnetic pollution
Grounds and anchors spiritual energy to the earth
Promotes a sense of security and stability

specifications.material: Raw Natural Black Tourmaline + Gold Electroplated Cap & Bail
